name: outage-atlas
description: National, location-first US power-outage atlas: a free ODIN+NWS baseline for every location plus on-demand deep per-utility detail. Self-maintained by embedded agents behind copious audit gates.

scripts.test: node scripts/test_adapters.mjs && node scripts/validate_configs.mjs && node scripts/test_geo.mjs && node scripts/test_eta.mjs && node scripts/audit_csp.mjs && node scripts/audit_tos.mjs && node scripts/test_audits.mjs && node scripts/test_poster.mjs && node scripts/test_notify.mjs && node scripts/audit_seo.mjs && node scripts/test_leadgen.mjs
scripts.gen:assets: node scripts/gen_icons.mjs && node scripts/gen_og_cards.mjs && node scripts/gen_area_pages.mjs
scripts.gen:national: node scripts/gen_us_counties.mjs && node scripts/gen_og_cards.mjs && AREA_SOURCE=scripts/data/us-counties.json node scripts/gen_area_pages.mjs
